note: Pixel values in find.png are scaled by 50x for visibility. Object 1 = value 50, Object 2 = value 100, etc.

objects.description: The main rectangular trampoline with a blue padded frame and white mesh bed in the foreground.
A blue rectangular mat lying flat on the trampoline frame on the left side.
A large, thick blue mat standing vertically against the wall in the background.
Another large, thick blue mat standing vertically against the wall on the left.
A folded red and yellow mat placed on the right side of the trampoline area.
A stack of dark green/grey mats piled up in the background.
A wooden door visible on the left side of the room.
A blue mat placed on top of the trampoline frame in the background.
A red mat visible on the floor to the left.
